summary: Manual implementation review approved GH-169 PR #174 current implementation head c8923ff7fc6be9f48cf1ab94aee56452689ff885 for a fixture-only Codex-like shell direction spike. The review covers WebEnvoy-native UI foundation primitives, panel/topbar/composer/navigation-rail/site-skill/settings/right-inspector styling strategy, packaged preview evidence, evidence-map carrier, and GH-169 carrier consistency. It does not approve GH-170 migration, GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live owner-runtime integration, or final real data contracts. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to GH-169 review carriers.
reviewed_validation_summary: CodeGraph exploration completed for restored Codex source and this repo; restored `AppShellLayout`, `LeftPanel`, `RightPanel`, `BottomPanel`, `ResizeHandle`, navigation rail, plugin page, and settings page strategies were mapped into WebEnvoy-native primitives and `DESIGN.md` foundation rules; `npm run build`, `WEBENVOY_PACKAGED_SMOKE_SCREENSHOT=artifacts/gh-169-codex-like-shell.png npm run smoke:packaged`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-169 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-169 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-169 --json` passed. Hosted run 28675908540 passed py-compile/demo-bootstrap/repo-local-cli/loom-check and failed only at loom-pr-merge-gate because current-head review artifacts were not yet present. Screenshot: `artifacts/gh-169-codex-like-shell.png`.
follow_ups: Update PR #174 metadata to the post-carrier head, rerun hosted checks, and require loom-pr-merge-gate to pass before merging GH-169.
Do not close #167 after GH-169; continue GH-170 and GH-171 as separate dependent work.
Treat current fixture functions and data shapes as preview scaffolding only, not implementation contracts.

consumed_inputs.scope_boundary: Fixture-only direction spike. No GH-170 content migration, no GH-171 QA completion, no Stage 5, no live Core/Harbor/Lode, and no real function/data contract approval.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The reviewed implementation matches GH-169's bounded direction-confirmation scope, uses WebEnvoy-native primitives while absorbing maintainable Codex UI structure/behavior, keeps data fixture-only, records out-of-scope boundaries, and has local plus hosted evidence up to the missing-review gate.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The reviewed implementation matches GH-169's bounded direction-confirmation scope, uses WebEnvoy-native primitives while absorbing maintainable Codex UI structure/behavior, keeps data fixture-only, records out-of-scope boundaries, and has local plus hosted evidence up to the missing-review gate.
